ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tide_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "tide" REAL /* Tide level measured by the sensor */,
  "observed" REAL /* Observed water level */,
  "surge" REAL /* Surge level */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias in the measurement */,
  "total_water_level" REAL /* Total water level (TWL) */,
  "surge_90p" REAL /* 90th percentile of surge */,
  "twl_90p" REAL /* 90th percentile of total water level */,
  "surge_10p" REAL /* 10th percentile of surge */,
  "twl_10p" REAL /* 10th percentile of total water level */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-1) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, model, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tide_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, maintenance, offline) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., radar, acoustic, pressure) */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Measurement interval of the sensor (e.g., 15 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor with the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., malfunction, data anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_issues_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sensor data, reports) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, anomaly detection) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES tide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_tide" REAL /* Predicted tide level */,
  "predicted_surge" REAL /* Predicted surge level */,
  "predicted_twl" REAL /* Predicted total water level */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_interval" INTEGER /* Prediction interval (e.g., 15 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the reading */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reading */,
  "tide" REAL /* Tide level */,
  "observed" REAL /* Observed water level */,
  "surge" REAL /* Surge level */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias in the measurement */,
  "total_water_level" REAL /* Total water level */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor for which the setting applies */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the setting was last updated */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., configuration, calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_settings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (0-1) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality assessment */,
  "assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who assessed the data */,
  "assessed_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for assessment (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES tide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "tide" REAL /* Tide level */,
  "observed" REAL /* Observed water level */,
  "surge" REAL /* Surge level */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias in the measurement */,
  "total_water_level" REAL /* Total water level */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, model, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_percentiles" (
  "percentile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentile calculation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point for which percentiles are calculated */,
  "surge_90p" REAL /* 90th percentile of surge */,
  "twl_90p" REAL /* 90th percentile of total water level */,
  "surge_10p" REAL /* 10th percentile of surge */,
  "twl_10p" REAL /* 10th percentile of total water level */,
  "percentile_type" TEXT /* Type of percentile (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_percentiles_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES tide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., data spike, data drop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who detected the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly resolution (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES tide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation activity */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point validated */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., cross-check, consistency check) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES tide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the model (e.g., RMSE, MAE) */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
